prompts:
OzBargain is the best free competition source in Australia. No paywall, real entry URLs, community-verified.

Update ~/compfish/compfish_scraper.py to add scrape_ozbargain():

URL: https://www.ozbargain.com.au/competition
Also scrape: https://www.ozbargain.com.au/competition/closing (closing soon)
Also scrape: https://www.ozbargain.com.au/competition/all (all active)

The page is server-rendered HTML (no JS needed, use requests). Each competition is a node with:
- Title (link text)
- URL (href to the competition entry page — these are REAL direct URLs)
- Prize value (usually in the title)
- Closing date (shown on the page)
- Entry type tags (instant win, lucky draw, daily entry, etc)

Parse all competitions from the page. Feed into add_competition() with source="ozbargain".

Then run a full scrape and report counts per source.

cd ~/compfish && ./venv/bin/python3 compfish_daemon.py scrape
